_comment: Arbres de talents EotE, transcrits depuis les images fournies. Un objet par spécialisation, chacune rattachée à sa carrière. Format TalentNode = {id, x, y, title, description?, xpCost, prerequisiteIds, maxRank?} — même structure que SpecializationDoc.talents dans le moteur de règles. x/y = position en colonne/ligne telle qu'affichée sur la grille officielle (colonne 0 = première colonne à gauche, ligne 0 = première ligne en haut). Logique d'import/branchement traitée plus tard — ce fichier ne fait que capturer fidèlement le contenu des images.

talents.title: Grit
talents.description: Gain +1 strain threshold.

talents.title: Lethal Blows
talents.description: Add +10 per rank of Lethal Blows to any Critical Injury results inflicted on opponents.

talents.title: Stalker
talents.description: Add [Boost] per rank of Stalker to all Stealth and Coordination checks.

talents.title: Dodge
talents.description: When targeted by combat check, may perform a Dodge incidental to suffer a number of strain no greater than ranks of Dodge, then upgrade the difficulty of the check by that number.

talents.title: Precise Aim
talents.description: Once per round, may perform Precise Aim maneuver. Suffer a number of strain no greater than ranks in Precise Aim, then reduce target's melee and ranged defense by that number.

talents.title: Jump Up
talents.description: Once per round, may stand from seated or prone as an incidental.

talents.title: Quick Strike
talents.description: Add [Boost] per rank of Quick Strike to combat checks against targets that have not acted yet this encounter.

talents.title: Quick Draw
talents.description: Once per round, draw or holster a weapon or accessible item as an incidental.

talents.title: Targeted Blow
talents.description: After making a successful attack, may spend 1 Destiny Point to add damage equal to Agility to one hit.

talents.title: Stalker
talents.description: Add [Boost] per rank of Stalker to all Stealth and Coordination checks.

talents.title: Lethal Blows
talents.description: Add +10 per rank of Lethal Blows to any Critical Injury results inflicted on opponents.

talents.description: After a making a successful attack, may spend 1 Destiny Point to add damage equal to Intellect to one hit.

talents.title: Stalker
talents.description: Add [Boost] per rank of Stalker to all Stealth and Coordination checks.

talents.title: Sniper Shot
talents.description: Before making a non-thrown ranged attack, may perform a Sniper Shot maneuver to increase the weapon's range by 1 range band per rank in Sniper Shot. Upgrade the difficulty of the attack by 1 per range band increase.

talents.description: When targeted by combat check, may perform a Dodge incidental to suffer a number of strain no greater than ranks of Dodge, then upgrade the difficulty of the check by that number.

talents.description: Add +10 per rank of Lethal Blows to any Critical Injury results inflicted on opponents.

talents.title: Precise Aim
talents.description: Once per round, may perform Precise Aim maneuver. Suffer a number of strain no greater than ranks in Precise Aim, then reduce target's melee and ranged defense by that number.

talents.title: Deadly Accuracy
talents.description: When acquired, choose 1 combat skill. Add damage equal to ranks in that skill to one hit of successful attack made using that skill.

talents.title: Dedication
talents.description: Gain +1 to a single characteristic. This cannot bring a characteristic above 6.

talents.title: Master of Shadows
talents.description: Once per round, suffer 2 strain to decrease difficulty of next Stealth or Skulduggery check by one.

talents.title: Brace
talents.description: Perform the Brace maneuver to remove [Setback] per rank of Brace from next Action. This may only remove [Setback] added by environmental circumstances.

talents.title: Toughened
talents.description: Gain +2 wound threshold.

talents.title: Intimidating
talents.description: May suffer a number of strain to downgrade difficulty of Coercion checks, or upgrade difficulty when targeted by Coercion checks, by an equal number. Strain suffered this way cannot exceed ranks in Intimidating.

talents.title: Defensive Stance
talents.description: Once per round, may perform Defensive Stance maneuver and suffer a number of strain to upgrade difficulty of all incoming melee attacks by an equal number. Strain suffered this way cannot exceed ranks in Defensive Stance.

talents.title: Spare Clip
talents.description: Cannot run out of ammo due to [Threat]. Items with Limited Ammo quality run out of ammo as normal.

talents.description: Choose 1 weapon, armor, or other item and give it a permanent improvement while it remains in use.

talents.description: Add 1 damage per rank of Point Blank to damage of one hit of successful attack while using Ranged (Heavy) or Ranged (Light) skills at close range or engaged.
